title: Addis Dustpan and Soft Brush Set, Linen Cream
features: Ideal for indoor use - soft bristles that access those niche areas
Heavy duty soft nylon bristle fill that leaves no dirt behind
Dustpan and brush locks together for storage
Rubber lip which helps trap dirt and transfer it with ease to the pan
Addis - part of the home since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Versatile The soft brushes can be used on any flooring without the worry of causing any scratches. For a smooth finish. Rubber Lip The rubber lip of the pan ensures all dirt gets swept up thoroughly leaving no residue of bits behind. Dimensions W225mm X H315mm X D110mm
